label: L2 Low (de-duplicated, evidence-anchored)
description: Addresses S2-01 and S2-02: the per-level ECAV and STI multiplicative axes are collapsed to sigma=0 (fixed at 1.0), retaining the per-subsystem axis as the single load-model random factor. Dirichlet concentration is tripled, narrowing level-mix draws around the mean. Cohort decay is fixed at mode 0.7. Retire-year retains its evidence-anchored triangular (8, 12, 18).

notes.s2_01_fix: per-level ECAV axis (L3/L4/L5 lognormals) and per-level STI axis (Basic/Semi/Highly) are REMOVED. Only the per-subsystem axis remains. This eliminates the multiplicative dual-axis duplication.
notes.cohort_decay: omitted (fixed at config default 0.7) because its spread primarily perturbs the pre-2024 cohort that decays out by 2036 under the retire logic.
notes.cav_alpha_x3: alpha [15.0, 9.99, 5.01] preserves the MEDIUM mean (L3=0.5, L4=0.333, L5=0.167) while narrowing the simplex.
